meta.title: Let's watch Rocket Lab's announcement
meta.description:
On August 6, 2019, Rocket Lab Founder and CEO Peter Beck will make a major company announcement and provide detail on the company's continued achievements in providing frequent and reliable access to space for small satellites.

I'm not sure what this is, but they're making a pretty big deal of it. So let's watch it, guess what it's gonna be, talk about it and then we might have to switch to the SpaceX livestream.

--------------------------------------------
